For You, Rahul
↓
Chapter One
Our Memories
our first picture
Chapter Two
At the Start
The very beginning...
I didn't know what was starting. I just knew something felt different about you — like a quiet kind of warmth I wanted to stay near.
Our first real talk
That conversation that went on too long and neither of us noticed. I kept thinking — I could do this every day.
When things got harder
We had our fights, our silences, our misunderstandings. But we stayed. That taught me more about us than the easy days ever could.
After every storm
We always found our way back. A little more understanding, a little more sure of each other. That's what I call love — choosing to stay.
Right now & always
I am so glad it's you. Every single day — even the messy ones — I am glad it's you, Rahul.
Always yours, Sahasra
No matter what — at the end of the day, it's just us.
from Sahasra
To Rahul
♡
Open your envelope
Babe...
Ups and Downs in a relation are always the best. I'll tell you why... When everything is perfect — it feels easy. But during misunderstandings, fights, arguments, stress — you see whether both people are willing to stay, communicate. It's like we handled that and now we can handle anything... I feel it builds up confidence. I wanna be better for youuu... I'll understand..... If being in love was smooth, it would feel ordinary — but after a heated up argument you'll realize that "At the end of the day it's just USSSSS." Sorry if I'm not enough! I WILL ALWAYS LOVE YOU THE SAME.
— Sahasra
♡
